app.title: Inline translation editor
app.subtitle: Alt/Option-click any editable translated text, change it, and save directly into JSON.
app.instructionsBody: Switch to Hebrew or Arabic, then Alt/Option-click the login button text or page heading.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Use this tiny screen to test inline translation editing.

cards.whatItDoesBody: The browser sends edits to a Vite dev middleware. The middleware writes the matching JSON resource file.
cards.safeBody: The editor endpoints are only registered while Vite is running in dev-server mode.
